seo_desc_default: Discover TrailFusion AI's innovative app collection! Check out 'GP Teachers' for English learning, 'Wood Golem Forest' strategy puzzle, 'Word Blaster' vocabulary game, 'Debate Master' AI, and 'Hacking Timer' focus timer!
seo_keywords_default: TrailFusion AI, GP Teachers, Wood Golem Forest, Word Blaster, Debate Master, Hacking Timer, English learning, puzzle game, vocabulary game, debate AI, focus timer, Apple Watch app
og_desc_default: Discover innovative apps from TrailFusion AI! GP Teachers, Wood Golem Forest, Word Blaster, Debate Master, Hacking Timer
twitter_desc_default: Discover innovative apps from TrailFusion AI! GP Teachers, Wood Golem Forest, Word Blaster, Debate Master, Hacking Timer
video_not_supported: Your browser does not support video playback.
gpt_hero_desc: Real practice with AI English conversation partners! Improve your English skills anytime, anywhere with unique teachers.
gpt_features_desc_no_wb: "GP Teachers" is an innovative English learning app that allows you to practically improve your English conversation skills through dialogue with AI.
gpt_feature1_desc: Actually converse with unique teacher characters. Advanced voice recognition technology automatically recognizes spoken English, and AI responds in natural English.
gpt_feature2_desc: Choose from daily conversation courses (beginner, intermediate, advanced) and grammar courses (junior high 1st, 2nd, 3rd year levels). Progress at your own pace.
gpt_feature3_desc: Contains useful English phrases for each lesson. Listen to pronunciation and favorite phrases for easy review.
gpt_feature5_desc: Check your progress with learning statistics and focus on areas you often get wrong.
gpt_feature6_desc: Analyzes your learning patterns to suggest optimal study plans. Automatically detects weaknesses to help you improve efficiently.
gpt_testimonials_desc: Here's what users are saying about GP Teachers.
gpt_review1_content: Perfect for English conversation practice! The AI has natural conversations, which improved my speaking skills.
gpt_review2_content_no_wb: The level-specific courses are great, and I like that I can learn at my own pace. The phrasebook is also helpful for review.
gpt_faq_desc: Here are common questions and answers about GP Teachers.
gpt_faq1_q: Can I use it immediately after installation?
gpt_faq1_a: Yes, you can use it immediately after installation. There's a simple setup on first launch.
gpt_faq2_q: What English levels does it support?
gpt_faq2_a: It supports a wide range from beginners to advanced users. Courses are structured by level.
gpt_contact_desc: If you have any questions or requests regarding the app, please feel free to contact us.
golem_hero_title: Stick-Taking Strategy! Wood Golem's Great Forest Adventure
golem_hero_desc: Embark on a grand adventure with a little wooden golem in this unique puzzle game.
golem_feature1_desc: Each stage demands complex strategy, testing the player's thinking skills.
golem_feature2_desc: Enjoy the process of the little golem growing under your guidance.
golem_review1_content: Simple rules, yet deep. The story is also interesting!
golem_faq1_q: I don't understand the game rules.
golem_faq1_a: You can check the details from the 'Rules' button in the app.
golem_game_desc: Try out the strategies you've learned! Test your skills against AI.
golem_game_select_role: Choose to go first or second
golem_game_drag_instruction: Drag to select sticks. Release mouse to confirm your move.
golem_strategy_desc: Easy-to-understand illustrated explanation of winning strategies based on Nim theory.
golem_basic_rules_list: Take at least one stick from each row
You can take any number from the same row
The person who takes the last stick loses
Make your opponent take the last stick to win
golem_case1_title: Case 1: One Large Pile + Multiple Single Piles
golem_case1_explanation: Strategy: When there are an even number of single piles, leave one stick in the large pile to make it odd. When there are an odd number of single piles, take all from the large pile to maintain the odd number.
golem_nim_concept_desc: The value calculated by XOR operation (exclusive OR) of the number of sticks in each row.
wb_hero_desc: Shoot down English words in space! A level-based vocabulary learning shooter game.
wb_features_desc: Master English vocabulary楽しく through games! Dramatically improve your vocabulary with "Word Blaster".
wb_feature1_desc: Covers a wide range of words from EIKEN Level 5 to high TOEIC scores. You can learn according to your level.
wb_feature2_desc: Shoot down enemies (words) that appear one after another by choosing the correct translation! Stage-clearing gameplay keeps you engaged.
wb_feature3_desc: A formidable boss appears at the end of each level. Dodge special attacks and aim for the key vocabulary weaknesses!
wb_feature4_desc: Flexibly set the language you want to learn (English, Japanese, etc.) and your native language. Supports learners worldwide.
ronpa_hero_desc: Defeat AI debaters! Acquire the strongest debating skills.
ronpa_features_desc: Elevate your logical thinking and expression skills to the limit through heated debates with AI.
ronpa_feature1_desc: Debate battle with diverse AI characters like Hiroyuki-style, Lu Bu-style. Each challenges you with their unique style.
ronpa_feature2_desc: AI analyzes your arguments in real-time, pointing out deviations, weaknesses, and suggesting improvements for more persuasive arguments.
ronpa_feature3_desc: Improve debate skills step-by-step in lesson mode based on specific themes and tasks. Acquire skills useful from daily conversation to business negotiations.
ht_hero_desc: Hack your focus with Apple Watch! A customizable interval timer.
ht_features_desc: Your Apple Watch transforms into the ultimate focus support tool!
ht_feature1_desc: No iPhone needed! All features work standalone on Apple Watch. Easily manage your focus time.
ht_feature2_desc: Notification interval, alarm type (vibration, sound, combination), pattern, duration, days/time, pre-notifications, etc., all customizable to your liking.
ht_feature3_desc: Reliable notifications even in the background. Never miss important task breaks or rest times. Supports critical alerts.
vanlife_hero_desc: Even beginners can build it! Transform a used HiAce into a full-fledged camper van. All DIY process revealed.
vanlife_process_desc: Detailed introduction of the entire process from purchasing a used HiAce to completing a full-fledged camper van.
vanlife_step1_desc: From selecting the right used HiAce for your budget and purpose to purchase. Detailed explanation of check points for mileage, model year, and equipment.
vanlife_step2_desc: Interior design that maximizes limited space. Efficiently plan the layout of bed, kitchen, and storage.
vanlife_step3_desc: How to select and install insulation materials. Introducing construction methods that even beginners can do, from wall panels to flooring and ceiling finishing.
vanlife_step4_desc: Installation of sub-battery system, solar panels, and inverter. Safe wiring methods and power management.
vanlife_step5_desc: Manufacturing and installation of beds, tables, kitchens, and storage shelves. Creating original furniture that emphasizes usability.
vanlife_feature1_desc: Cool in summer, warm in winter. Using high-performance insulation materials to create a comfortable indoor environment year-round.
vanlife_feature2_desc: Solar panels + lithium batteries enable 3 days of independent living even in places without electricity.
vanlife_feature3_desc: Equipped with IH cooking heater, refrigerator, and sink. Enjoy authentic cooking even while traveling.
vanlife_feature4_desc: Transforms from sofa during the day to bed at night. Unique design that maximizes limited space.
creator_position: TrailFusion AI Representative / Van Life Creator
creator_bio_desc: While working on app development at an IT company, practices dual life enjoying van life on weekends. Currently sharing the creation process on YouTube and TikTok with the concept of "authentic camper van DIY that anyone can do".
creator_philosophy_desc: With the theme of "fusion of technology and analog," I apply the skills cultivated in digital to real manufacturing, proposing a richer lifestyle.
media_title: Real-time sharing of the creation process
media_desc: YouTube provides detailed creation processes, while TikTok delivers fun highlights.
youtube_desc: Detailed HiAce DIY creation process, tool usage, and even failure stories revealed without hiding anything. With careful explanations for beginners.
tiktok_desc: Delivering highlights of creation, the excitement of completion moments, and fun van life moments in short videos.
twitter_desc: Real-time information including creation progress reports, van life tweets, and interactions with followers.
vanlife_contact_desc: Please feel free to contact us for questions about HiAce DIY, collaboration consultations, and more.
footer_brand_desc: Aiming to develop highly original apps
golem_hint_stage2: Take 1 stick from the 2nd row to make your opponent take the last one.
golem_hint_stage3: Take 1 stick from the 3rd row to leave 1 stick in each row.
golem_hint_stage4: You can't win if you go first. Try going second.
golem_hint_stage5: Take 1 stick from the 2nd row to make it even for your opponent.
golem_hint_stage6: Choose to go second and see what happens.
golem_hint_stage7: Take 1 stick from the 2nd row to aim for an even state.
golem_hint_stage8: Choose to go second and see what happens.
golem_hint_stage9: Take 2 sticks from the 3rd row to keep it even.
golem_hint_stage10: Choose to go second and see what happens.
